title: Junior Software Developer Intern
description:
Junior Software Developer Intern
Read Write X is seeking a Junior Software Developer Intern to join our team. We are building a suite of products and are looking for developers to specifically focus on contributing to building a human-centered, AI-collaborative word processing and program management platform to help engineers, innovators, and leaders write better and faster and a agentic AI ethical hacking platform. This is an exciting opportunity for a motivated individual to contribute to a growing product and gain hands-on experience in a dynamic startup environment.
Responsibilities:
Assist in the development and maintenance of our word processing and program management platform.
Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code for new features and updates.
Collaborate with senior developers and product managers to understand project requirements and technical specifications.
Participate in code reviews to ensure high-quality code standards.
Help with debugging, testing, and troubleshooting to identify and resolve software defects.
Qualifications:
Currently enrolled in a Bachelor's or Master's degree program in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
Familiarity with at least one programming language (e.g., Python, JavaScript, Java, C++).
Basic understanding of web development concepts (HTML, CSS, JavaScript).
Experience or expressed interest in the area of cybersecurity, vulnerability management, ethical offensive hacking.
Experience with version control systems like Git is a plus.
Strong problem-solving skills and a passion for learning new technologies.
Excellent communication and teamwork abilities.
Expressed interest in human-centered artificial intelligence.
If you are a self-starter with a desire to build innovative software, we'd love to hear from you.
